problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
